sql_array: CREATE TABLE hosts (id INT PRIMARY KEY, ip_address VARCHAR(15) NOT NULL, host_name VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO hosts (id, ip_address, host_name) VALUES (1, '127.0.0.1', NULL), (2, '192.168.1.1', 'local');
SELECT id, tcpip_gethostbyaddr(ip_address) AS fqdn FROM hosts WHERE fqdn REGEXP '^local$';
SELECT id, ip_address FROM hosts WHERE REGEXP_REPLACE(tcpip_gethostbyaddr(ip_address), 'local', '') IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE logs (log_id INT PRIMARY KEY, host_id INT, log_message TEXT, timestamp DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO logs (log_id, host_id, log_message) VALUES (1, 1, 'Query executed'), (2, 2, 'Connection established');
SELECT l.log_id, h.ip_address FROM logs l JOIN hosts h ON l.host_id = h.id WHERE h.ip_address REGEXP '^192\.168\..*';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hosts WHERE tcpip_gethostbyaddr(ip_address) IS NULL;
SELECT AVG(LENGTH(log_message)) AS avg_length FROM logs GROUP BY host_id HAVING AVG(LENGTH(log_message)) > 10;
SELECT h.host_name, tcpip_gethostbyaddr('256.256.256.256') AS invalid_host FROM hosts h WHERE h.host_name REGEXP '^local.*$';
